main.description: A vote on an open question reply. Stores the voter's upvote/downvote on a specific reply.

subject.description: The reply post URI being voted on.

voteNullifier.description: Privacy-preserving one-person-one-vote nullifier for this open question reply, issued by m8.

eligibilityProofRef.description: Opaque reference to the m8 eligibility/nullifier proof used to cast this vote.
